title: Accessible arrival support
guidance: Keep accessible entrances staffed, verify elevator availability, separate mobility assistance queues from general security lines, and direct fans to guest services if they need escort support.

title: Sensory and visual assistance
guidance: Offer clear spoken directions, quieter waiting areas where available, visual assistance through guest services, and repeated confirmation before moving fans into high-density routes.

title: Accessible post-match egress
guidance: Hold accessible pickup corridors open, protect elevator banks from exit surges, and assign volunteers to mobility assistance points until the final exit wave clears.
